nasb.text: Then I will make their waters settle And will cause their rivers to run like oil,” Declares the Lord God.

esv.text: Then I will make their waters clear, and cause their rivers to run like oil, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 那時，我必使眾水澄清，使江河的水像油一樣緩流；這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我要使埃及的河流清澈见底， 像油一样缓缓流淌。 这是主耶和华说的。
